title: BEM-791 execute route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:15 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
route=load('governance/state/bem790_route_after_execute_runtime.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
responses=files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
if rs=='next_check_claude_runtime_after_dispatch':
    status='runtime_check_executed_response_found' if responses else ('runtime_check_executed_runtime_seen' if runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at') else 'runtime_check_executed_no_runtime')
    next_action='process response' if responses else ('diagnose Claude action outcome' if runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at') else 'recheck dispatch result and target workflow validity')
elif rs=='next_patch_dispatch_failure':
    status='dispatch_failure_patch_pending'; next_action=route.get('next_action','patch dispatch failure')
elif rs in ['next_reposition_queue_processor','next_reinstall_queue_processor']:
    status='runner_processor_repair_pending'; next_action=route.get('next_action','repair runner processor')
elif rs=='next_process_response':
    status='response_processing_pending'; next_action='read response and produce agreed protocol'
else:
    status='unknown_route_diagnosis_pending'; next_action='diagnose route status'
state={'bem':'BEM-791','status':status,'route_status':rs,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'responses':responses[-20:],'dispatch_results':results[-20:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem791_execute_route_after_bem790.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem791_execute_route_after_bem790.md').write_text('# BEM-791 | Execute Route After BEM-790 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem791_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-791'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem791_execute_route_after_bem790.json','governance/reports/bem791_execute_route_after_bem790.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem791_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed route after BEM-790 by checking runtime, response mailbox, and dispatch results')
"""
No issue comments.
